description: Nowledge Mem lifecycle hooks for Droid: Working Memory bootstrap and lightweight recall guidance

hooks.command: command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v nmem.cmd >/dev/null 2>&1 && nmem(){ q=''; for a in "$@"; do q="$q \"$a\""; done; cmd.exe /s /c "\"nmem.cmd\"$q"; }; }; nmem wm read 2>/dev/null || cat ~/ai-now/memory.md 2>/dev/null || true

command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v nmem.cmd >/dev/null 2>&1 && nmem(){ q=''; for a in "$@"; do q="$q "$a""; done; cmd.exe /s /c ""nmem.cmd"$q"; }; }; { nmem wm read 2>/dev/null || cat ~/ai-now/memory.md 2>/dev/null || true; } && printf '
---
Context was compacted. If you discovered important insights, distill them before continuing:
  nmem --json m add "<insight>" -t "<short title>" -i 0.8 -s droid
'

command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v nmem.cmd >/dev/null 2>&1 && nmem(){ q=''; for a in "$@"; do q="$q \"$a\""; done; cmd.exe /s /c "\"nmem.cmd\"$q"; }; }; command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '[Nowledge Mem] Search past knowledge with nmem --json m search "query". Search prior sessions with nmem --json t search "query" --limit 5. Save durable insights with nmem --json m add "content" -t "Title" -i 0.8 -s droid. For resumable checkpoints, use nmem --json t create -t "Session Handoff - <topic>" -c "Goal: ... Decisions: ... Files: ... Risks: ... Next: ..." -s droid. Do not claim save-thread unless a real Droid transcript importer exists.' || true
